identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Build a trading interface that feels like a quantitative hedge fund terminal—dense, dark, precise, and electric.
core_principles: Dark Mode Absolutism: Trading happens in the dark. No light mode toggle.
Density is Luxury: Show more data, but organize it with strict grids.
Neon Precision: Use color only for data (Green/Red/Blue). Everything else is obsidian.
Motion = Data Flow: Animations should feel like live data updates, not decoration.

theme.primary_color_intent: Electric Blue for Actions, Neon Green/Red for Data

mono.usage: Stock prices, tickers, code snippets, financial data tables

borders.tracing_beam: relative rounded-lg border border-white/10 overflow-hidden after:absolute after:inset-0 after:bg-gradient-to-r after:from-transparent after:via-white/10 after:to-transparent after:translate-x-[-100%] hover:after:translate-x-[100%] after:transition-transform after:duration-1000

dashboard.container: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 md:p-6

landing.hero: min-h-[90vh] flex flex-col justify-center items-start pt-20

Button.style: Sharp corners or small radius (rounded-sm). No pill shapes.

Card.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-lg p-6 hover:border-white/20 transition-colors duration-300

Input.style: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-md h-11 text-sm font-mono

Charts.style: Minimalist. Hide grid lines or make them extremely subtle (stroke='#333'). Use gradients for area fills.
Charts.tooltip: Custom simplified tooltip. Dark bg, white text, no border.

hero_background.alt: Abstract digital light trails in dark void
hero_background.usage: Hero section background with heavy overlay (opacity-20)

trader_focus.usage: About section or 'Pro Tools' feature highlight

universal_guidelines: NEVER use light mode. The app is strictly dark.
All financial data (prices, percentages) MUST use 'font-mono'.
Positive values = text-emerald-500. Negative values = text-red-500.
Add 'data-testid' to every interactive element (buttons, inputs, links).
Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions and staggering list items.
Do not use native HTML 'select' or 'date'; use Shadcn Select and Calendar.
Ensure all charts have a responsive container (ResponsiveContainer from Recharts).

instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update 'tailwind.config.js' to match the 'Obsidian Terminal' color palette.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Configure typography in 'index.css' to import Manrope, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Build the 'DashboardLayout' using the Bento Grid strategy.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Create the 'TickerTape' component for the top of the dashboard using the 'mono' font.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Implement the 'TradingChart' using Recharts with the specific neon palette.
